name: stocklens-extension
description: Chrome/Edge extension for pure-math stock technical analysis

scripts.build:wasm: cd rust-indicators && wasm-pack build --target web --out-dir ../public/stocklens-wasm/pkg --out-name stocklens_wasm
scripts.build:js: tsc && esbuild src/content/content.ts --bundle --outfile=public/content.js --minify --format=esm && esbuild src/background/background.ts --bundle --outfile=public/background.js --minify --format=esm && esbuild src/popup.ts --bundle --outfile=public/popup.js --minify --format=esm
scripts.build: npm run build:wasm && npm run build:js
